items.title: Prediction Market Bets Surge on World Cup Mania

items.title: SK Hynix Set to Make Record-Setting US Debut
items.description: SK Hynix Inc. raised $26.5 billion in its American depositary share offering, the largest ever US first-time share sale by a foreign company. Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: Retail Traders Chase Shiny Objects But Refuse to Bet on S&P 500
items.description: Retail traders, some of the staunchest supporters of the stock market this decade, are showing signs of waning conviction.

items.title: AlphaQuest Founder Lost Control at Quant Fund, Investor Alleges
items.description: AlphaQuest founder Nigol Koulajian admitted losing control of trading at his $2 billion quantitative hedge fund before announcing plans to shut it down, an institutional investor claimed in a lawsuit.

items.title: Macro Hedge Fund Deem Raised $1 Billion From Abu Dhabi’s ADIC

items.title: Czech Price Pressures Warrant Increased Caution for Central Bank
items.description: The Czech central bank said monetary policy caution remains warranted, with the headline inflation rate likely to return to or “slightly above” the 2% target this year following a recent drop.

items.title: Delta Reaffirms Profit Guidance as Premium Demand Rises

items.title: Cómo criar hijos en una de las capitales más calurosas de Europa

items.title: Oil Product Markets Are the Real Hormuz Pain Point
items.description: While crude has nearly erased its wartime rally, refined fuels are increasingly tight.

items.title: Echostar Bulls Say It Offers Traders Discounted SpaceX Exposure
items.description: SpaceX may finally be within reach for public-market investors, but analysts say there’s a cheaper opportunity to get exposure to shares of the space technology company through EchoStar Corp.

items.title: Foreign Ownership of UK Firms Soared 35% Amid Glut of Deals
items.description: The number of British companies controlled by overseas firms soared 35% in the years after the outbreak of Covid, as cheap valuations drove a dealmaking boom.

items.title: US Stock Futures Slip After Tech Rally, SK Hynix Starts Trading
items.description: US equities were moving between losses and gains Friday as investors digested the record US listing of South Korea’s SK Hynix Inc. and prepared for the start of second-quarter earnings season.

items.title: Europe Must Increase Space Autonomy: ESA's Aschbacher
items.description:
